title: Chiikawa: Ningyo no Shima no Himitsu
titleRomaji: Chiikawa: Ningyo no Shima no Himitsu
titleNative: 映画ちいかわ 人魚の島のひみつ
synonyms: Chiikawa the Movie: The Secret of Mermaid Island
ちいかわ セイレーン編
synopsis: Based on a series of Chiikawa comics posted on X by Nagano from March to November 2023, known as the "Siren Arc" . One day, while Chiikawa and Hachiware were relaxing in the square, Usagi suddenly appeared with a flyer stuck to its face. When Hachiware checked the flyer, it was an invitation reading “Special Invitation to a Special Island.” Lured by promises like “Get 100x rewards for simple island quests!” and “Limited-edition island ramen, exclusive sweets—sweet and spicy treats all practically free!”, Chiikawa and the others decided to go on the island retreat. Boarding the ship alongside Rakko, who was suspicious of the flyer's contents, the group landed on the island... only to find something waiting for them there...!? (Source: Official Site, translated)

title: Fuyu no Okurimono
titleNative: 冬のおくりもの
synopsis: An original short directed by Kazuaki Terasawa, animated by WIT STUDIO and assistance from studio Kafka. It tells the story of a young girl's growth through an encounter with a mysterious creature. (Source: Anime News Network, edited) Note: The short premiered in a preview screening event together with "Mahoutsukai no Yome SEASON 2" episode one at Tachikawa Cinema City's Cinema Two in Tokyo on March 11, 2023. The animation was later uploaded onto the FlyingDog YouTube channel March 18, 2023. It will be also included on the limited first edition version of JUNNA's 5th anniversary 3rd full album "Dear" (CD+Blu-ray) released on April 12, 2023.

title: Fujimi 2-choume Koukyougakudan: Kanrei Zensen/Ame nochi Arashi
titleRomaji: Fujimi 2-choume Koukyougakudan: Kanrei Zensen/Ame nochi Arashi
titleNative: 富士見二丁目交響楽団 寒冷前線/雨のち嵐
synonyms: 富士見二丁目交響楽団シリーズ
synopsis: High school music teacher, Morimura Yuuki, is the concert master and first violinist of the amateur orchestra, Fujimi Orchestra. Surprisingly, a young conductor named Tonoin Kei (known as a musical genius) joins this small orchestra to conduct. Even though Tonoin is a strict conductor, all the members adore him for the notable improvements in their performances and soon Yuuki feels his efforts for the orchestra have been fruitless. Yuuki soon comes to the conclusion that his crush of 3 years likes Tonoin, and he decides to give up on her and leave the orchestra. Tonoin refuses to let him quit, confessing that he loves Yuuki, which reveals that he's gay. Tonoin's love confession confuses Yuuki and it leads to a very horrible misunderstanding. (Source: Anime News Network)

But then, he was pointed out by Hayasameru and Shirai, who works at the library, that he has not returned a book that he borrowed ten years ago. A manga about how Ishidaira went from trying to borrow a book from a library to working there instead. (Source: Kodansha, translated)

title: Catman
titleNative: キャットマン
synopsis: In a city filled with anthropomorphic cat-people, Catman lives free of rules and boundaries, doing everything he wants, which often collides with the other inhabitants of the city. Catman dares to be bold: it’s made in Flash, which is rarely seen nowadays; there are no spoken dialogue but instead is subbed in Japanese and English and has a original soundtrack made in purpose for the series.

title: Onmyouji: Heian Monogatari
titleNative: 陰陽師・平安物語
synonyms: Yin Yang Shi: Ping An Wu Yu
synopsis: The courtyard is awash with cherry blossom petals, appearing especially beautiful in the moonlight. Kagura, waking up, sits in the hallway facing the courtyard, "The courtyard at night, it seems like something can happen at anytime......" Suddenly a butterfly glides past, its scales glittering - Kochou no Sei. That's right, nighttime is indeed suitable for telling stories. Kagura grows sleepy under the influence of dust - Kochou no Sei. And after Kagura-sama falls asleep - that will be the beginning of the story in the dream!

title: Hamtaro Hai!
titleNative: とっとこハム太郎は〜い!
synopsis: Tottoko Hamutaro Hai! is the sequel to Tottoko Hamutaro, or in English, Hamtaro. The series revolves around the 15 original Ham-Hams in short 5-minute episodes. The Hai! series is animated differently from the original series, most notably, the head-to-body ratio is off, and it is also computer-generated in 3-D. (Source: Wikipedia)

title: PES: Peace Eco Smiles
titleNative: PES: Peace Eco Smile
synopsis: A collaborative effort between the Japanese automaker and Japanese anime company Studio 4°C, PES: Peace Eco Smile is a new web promotional anime series that centers around PES, a traveller from space, and NaSuBi, a mysterious life-form who is enamored by the charm of Earth. The car of choice for these strangers in a new world? The Prius, particularly the Prius Liftback and Prius C hatchback. These two hybrids seem to be as much a part of this series as the two main characters are. A Lexus LFA (likely the ride of the antagonist) and the Toyota Camry hybrid also have a role to play. Each anime short in the campaign will be three to four minutes long and will be posted on Toyota's specially-dedicated website. (Source: Auto Tribute)

title: Ranma 1/2: DoCo Music Video
titleNative: らんま1/2 DoCoミュージックビデオ
synopsis: This was a collection of the opening and ending OAV themes performed by DoCo, the musical group made up of Ranma ½ cast members. Also included is an interview with the cast during their recording of the "Tunnel of Lost Love" OAV. The interviewed voice actors included: Kappei Yamaguchi, Megumi Hayashibara, Noriko Hidaka, Keniichi Ogata, Minami Takeyama, Kikuko Inoue, Ryunosuke Obayashi, Hiromi Tsuru, Rei Sakuma, Toshikiko Seki, Miyoko Asou, Koichi Yamadera, Hirotaka Suzuoki, Saeko Shimazu, and Shigeru Chiba. (Source: furinkan.com/ranma/anime/specials.html)

title: Lucy-May of the Southern Rainbow
titleNative: 南の虹のルーシー
synopsis: Lucy's family moves from England to Australia planning to run a big farm. Starting a new life proves to be full of frustrations. Their agonizing days of despair continue until they finally obtain their farmland. However, Lucy and her sisters enjoy a range of new experiences such as discovering exotic animals and meeting with aborigines and other new people. (Source: AnimeNfo)

title: Embracing Those Emotions Forever
titleRomaji: Ano Hi no Kokoro wo Toraete
titleNative: あの日の心をとらえて
synopsis: A promotional anime that expresses the world where the future mobility “FlatFormer” that Hino Motors aims to develop exists. It's the year 20XX, and the latest technologies are protecting the nature of rural towns. The main character, Ruuto, and Michi, are childhood friends. But during the second year of junior high, as Michi moves to an urban area, the two drift apart. Ruuto doesn't want Michi to forget him. Michi doesn't want to show her weak side. The two friends go their separate ways. Mobility services transcend space and time and connect their hearts.

title: Ibitte Konai Gibo to Gishi
titleNative: いびってこない義母と義姉
synonyms: My Stepmother and Stepsisters Aren’t Wicked
My mother-in-law and sister-in-law who don't bully me.
synopsis: Miya is the illegitimate child of a prominent family. When her mother dies and her father’s estate agrees to take her in, she’s convinced she knows what awaits her in her new home: a life of servitude and misery at the hands of her wicked stepmother and stepsisters. Yet when she finally meets the women she expects to treat her like dirt, they actually end up being…sweet?! A hilarious and heartfelt comedy that’s sure to put a smile on your face! (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)
